description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three jobs: test, master-deploy-user, and tag-deploy-user. Include a before_script that exports GIT_SSH_URL by converting $CI_PROJECT_URL to an SSH URL. Use the image registry.gitlab.com/qcad.fi/docker/minimal:latest for the test job, which runs only on master and tags, executes "mkdir build && cd build", "cmake ..", "make -j4", and "make check" in the testing stage and is triggered manually. Use the image appropriate/curl:latest for both deploy jobs in the deploy stage, each running manually; master-deploy-user runs only on the master branch and tag-deploy-user runs only on tags, and both send a POST request with curl to $DEPLOYMENT_PIPELINE_TRIGGER_URL including token, ref=master, and variables TRIGGER_REPO_URL (the GIT_SSH_URL), TRIGGER_PACKAGE_NAME, TRIGGER_COMMIT_SHA, and for the tag job also TRIGGER_COMMIT_TAG.
